hero.description: I'm a Frontend Developer and Mobile App Developer from Liberia. I craft personalized websites to assist businesses in establishing a strong online presence.

about.title: About Me
about.greeting: Greetings! I'm a passionate Frontend developer and mobile app developer from Liberia with a keen eye for creating beautiful, functional websites and apps that help businesses establish a strong online presence.
about.experience: With 2.5 years of dedicated study and hands-on experience, I've developed expertise in modern web technologies and mobile app development.
about.missionText: My mission is to empower businesses and individuals by creating exceptional digital experiences that drive growth and engagement.
